svg.title: How Akhand Samaj Is Established — five-layer architecture
svg.desc: Five layers from coexistence ground to social evidence: Layer 0 coexistence and regulation; Layer 1 composition and orders; Layer 2 progressions and T1; Layer 3 knowledge-order gate; Layer 4 akhand samaj and sarvabhaum vyavastha telos.
svg.text: How Akhand Samaj Is Established
Consolidated architecture — five layers to evidenced undivided society and universal orderliness
Layer 0 · Coexistence ground
satta + units · saturation · unit signature · shram-gati-parinam · regulation ladder
satta = actionless mahakaran (sustaining ground, not efficient agent)
Layer 1 · Composition through orders
mixtures / compounds · four orders · niyati-vidhi conformance · six value kinds
assemblies persist while relationships fulfilled; decline when not
Layer 2 · Progressions and sentience threshold
niyati-kram · vikas-kram · jagriti-kram (distinct axes) · T1 gathanpurnata · T2 kriyapurnata · T3 vyavaharpurnata
mediative nucleus at atom scale → mediative atma at sentient scale
Layer 3 · Knowledge-order gate (achievement)
study → experiment → realisation-evidence · T2 activity / T3 conduct (pramanikta)
knowing → believing → recognising → fulfilling · provision vs achievement
Layer 4 · Social establishment (evidence)
sociality → production → sadupyog → humaneness → undivided sociality
four goals jointly evidenced · family → community → akhand samaj
five orderliness dimensions · ten-tier family orderliness · education-sanskar
Telos: Akhand Samaj + Sarvabhaum Vyavastha
humankind as one complementary whole · evidenced in awakened tradition
Not automatic under delusion — awakening closes the gate at Layer 3 before Layer 4 evidence
